# Lost Coffer

## Description

Upon pickup, gain 1 card reward and procure 1 random potion.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong safe Neow pick: gives an immediate card choice plus potion support without adding a curse or losing HP.
- Better than random rare when the deck needs controlled Act 1 fundamentals rather than high-variance power.
